value.found_quote: The Agent Runtime Code Execution ADK Tool provides a low-latency, highly efficient method for running AI-generated code using the Google Cloud Agent Runtime service. This tool is designed for fast execution, tailored for agentic workflows, and uses sandboxed environments for improved security.
value.rationale: The page explicitly describes the Agent Runtime Code Execution tool for ADK, confirming it provides a low-latency, sandboxed server-side code execution environment for ADK agents via Google Cloud Agent Runtime. The page notes it is "Supported in ADK Python v1.17.0," indicating it is generally available (active). All key aspects of the claim — low-latency, sandboxed environment, server-side execution, and Google Cloud Agent Runtime integration — are directly substantiated by the page content.
